title: Venezuelan Citrus Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish from Venezuela, infused with citrusy notes. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add mildly spicy sazon seasoning and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add pilaf and stir to coat with oil and seasoning.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the pilaf starts to brown.
Add currants, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add orange juice and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
